subject: Re: Munich
body:
posssible send details

----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Wednesday, January 3, 2007 5:09:36 PM
Subject: FW: Munich

Munich

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Lesley Groff

Executive Assistant to Jeffrey 
Epstein

 

 




From: Adam Bly [mailto:bly@seedmediagroup.com] 

Sent: Wednesday, January 03, 2007 5:02 PM
To: Lesley 
Groff
Subject: Munich




Lesley,

Could you please forward this to 
Jeffrey... 

Thanks,
Adam




Jeffrey,

Hubert Burda and Steffi Czerny asked me to extend you an 
invitation to come to DLD in Munich January 21-23. DLD is becoming the new TED. 
I went last year, and will go back this year and present. It is on the 
Sunday-Tuesday before Davos. Steffi said she will have Hubert and Yossi Vardi 
send you something as well. Are you interested in coming?

Also... after 
Davos I am going for the day (Jan 29) to see the new Large Hadron Collider at 
CERN (goes online end of the year and the tunnel will soon be off-limits) with 
some of the scientists there and Paola Antonelli, the curator of design at MoMA. 
Are you interested in coming?

Adam 




__________________________________________________
